languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's face — what remains of it — contorts in a grimace of rage.{/n} "Treacherous, spineless scum! You are unworthy of carrying the name von Valancius! You—"

languages.text: {n}Лицо Себериана — уцелевшая его часть — искажается в гримасе бешенства.{/n} "Вероломн{mf|ый|ая}, бесхребетн{mf|ый|ая} мерзав{mf|ец|ка}! Вы недостойны носить имя рода фон Валанциус! Вы..."

{n}Seberian's face — what remains of it — contorts in a grimace of rage.{/n} "Treacherous, spineless scum! You are unworthy of carrying the name von Valancius! You—"

languages.text: {n}El rostro de Seberian (o lo que queda de él) se retuerce en una mueca de furia.{/n} «¡Escoria cobarde y traicionera! ¡No eres dign{mf|o|a} del nombre von Valancius! ¡Eres...!».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's face — what remains of it — contorts in a grimace of rage.{/n} "Treacherous, spineless scum! You are unworthy of carrying the name von Valancius! You—"

traits.locale_text: {n}El rostro de Seberian (o lo que queda de él) se retuerce en una mueca de furia.{/n} «¡Escoria cobarde y traicionera! ¡No eres dign{mf|o|a} del nombre von Valancius! ¡Eres...!».

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安那残破的面容扭曲成愤怒的鬼脸。{/n}“卑鄙、懦弱的渣滓！你不配姓冯·瓦兰修斯！你——”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's face — what remains of it — contorts in a grimace of rage.{/n} "Treacherous, spineless scum! You are unworthy of carrying the name von Valancius! You—"

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安那残破的面容扭曲成愤怒的鬼脸。{/n}“卑鄙、懦弱的渣滓！你不配姓冯·瓦兰修斯！你——”

languages.text: {n}Une grimace de colère déforme le visage de Seberian, ou ce qu'il en reste.{/n} « Espèce de lâche {mf|déloyal|déloyale} ! Vous n'êtes pas digne de porter le nom de von Valancius ! Vous... »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's face — what remains of it — contorts in a grimace of rage.{/n} "Treacherous, spineless scum! You are unworthy of carrying the name von Valancius! You—"

traits.locale_text: {n}Une grimace de colère déforme le visage de Seberian, ou ce qu'il en reste.{/n} « Espèce de lâche {mf|déloyal|déloyale} ! Vous n'êtes pas digne de porter le nom de von Valancius ! Vous... »

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın yüzü, daha doğrusu ondan geriye kalanı öfkeyle buruşuyor.{/n} "Hain, omurgasız pislik! Von Valancius adını taşımaya layık değilsin! Sen..."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's face — what remains of it — contorts in a grimace of rage.{/n} "Treacherous, spineless scum! You are unworthy of carrying the name von Valancius! You—"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın yüzü, daha doğrusu ondan geriye kalanı öfkeyle buruşuyor.{/n} "Hain, omurgasız pislik! Von Valancius adını taşımaya layık değilsin! Sen..."

languages.text: {n}Seberian verzieht sein Gesicht — oder was davon übrig ist — zu einer wütenden Grimasse.{/n} "Verräterischer, rückgratloser Abschaum! Ihr seid nicht würdig, den Namen von Valancius zu tragen! Ihr ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's face — what remains of it — contorts in a grimace of rage.{/n} "Treacherous, spineless scum! You are unworthy of carrying the name von Valancius! You—"

languages.text: {n}セベリアンの顔、残った部分だけが怒りの表情を浮かべる。{/n}「裏切り者、臆病者め！ヴァランシウス家の名に値しない！お前は」
